overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game, walking through a neon-lit city street at night, entering a nightclub called 'RIOT', navigating through the interior with pink neon lighting, and ending on an upper balcony overlooking a DJ stage with massive yellow screens. The scene features futuristic architecture, holographic advertisements, and crowds of NPCs.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a bustling futuristic city sidewalk at night, passing a brightly lit food stall on the left while neon billboards illuminate the street ahead. The atmosphere is dense with cyberpunk aesthetic, featuring glowing advertisements and scattered pedestrians.

red velvet ropes on silver stanchions forming a queue line
floating green holographic advertisement cube displaying rotating content
large vertical screen displaying pink-haired character advertisement

segments.scene_description: Arriving at the entrance to the 'RIOT' nightclub, marked by a prominent neon sign overhead. The camera moves through a queue system with red velvet ropes, passing a green holographic display and a bouncer guarding the door.

scene_state.functional_zone: nightclub interior with pink neon bar and seating areas

ascending the metal staircase to the upper balcony level

metal staircase with glass railing leading to upper level

segments.scene_description: Inside the nightclub, the scene is bathed in pink neon light. The camera moves past a glowing bar counter and seating booths, then ascends a metal staircase toward the upper level, leaving the entrance area behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper balcony overlooking DJ stage with large yellow LED screens

events.description: emerging onto the upper balcony with panoramic view of the stage and dance floor below
character lights a cigarette while leaning on the balcony railing overlooking the stage

agents.ego_description: standing at the balcony railing watching the DJ perform on the illuminated stage below

notable_agents.action: DJ performing at the mixing station on the illuminated stage

entered.detail: massive stage with three large yellow LED screens and atmospheric fog effects
metal safety railing with neon accent lighting along the edge
metal truss tower with mounted stage lights and speakers
metal truss tower with mounted stage lights and speakers

segments.scene_description: On the upper balcony overlooking the main stage, massive yellow screens illuminate the DJ booth below while colored spotlights cut through the fog. The camera settles at the railing, providing a commanding view of the club's interior architecture and the performance space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bustling cyberpunk street into the immersive, neon-drenched interior of a high-energy nightclub. It begins by moving along a futuristic sidewalk past glowing food stalls and towering billboards before approaching the entrance of the RIOT nightclub. As the camera passes through a queue of red velvet ropes and a green holographic display, it transitions from the cool night air into a space bathed in vibrant pink neon light. The perspective then glides past a glowing bar and seating booths, ascending a metal staircase to leave the ground floor behind. Finally, the scene opens onto an upper balcony where massive yellow screens and cutting spotlights illuminate a DJ stage and a fog-filled dance floor below.
